text: I am to do more on holidays
But this one felt good
It was a good day then
Ya
Okay, I will not let u sleep next time 😅
I won’t be repeating this tho
It harms my overthinking brain
How do, u were asleep right
*how so
It starts overthinking about how I could do much better things
Sometimes it's fine and important too. Helps us rejuvenate.
My brain is deaf to logical words
Idk if therapy could do something
Yes, it could
You need someone to tell you things
Surprisingly I have one
And I am here for that..not a certified psychologist tho 😅
Ohh..who is it
Forget that I said this
He can time travel
It’s fine
Ohh I think I know him then
Yep you know from close
Don’t tell him tho
Okk.. I will let him figure it out 😄
Hehe
I’ll message u as I come back home
I gonna be out
Yesss ma'am
Heyy you
Still out?
Nope
I am home today
Were u busy
Going out night got me sick again
*at
Okay, take care
Is it bad.
I feel drained and my body hurts
I have never been this way
Did you take medicine
Yes
It’s tiring to sick
Be
Did u go to doctor?
Yes
I feel the stress is taking a toll on me
I feel guilty to do anything
Take rest until you feel fine. Take leave
I was getting worried
I am sorry
I keep feeling guilty to message u
No no, don't think like that
I understand. It's fine
Your health should be your priority
You just take care of yourself
I am going to take a break
From everything
I didn't know that. So, I was a little worried
That's good. There will always be time for other things
And let me know if u feel like I text way too much
I will do that
Should I stop
Yes
I feel restless
And u well
*unwell
I am sorry
Okayy. Sorry
I am just really disturbed
And need time
Sorry
I understand..it's fine..u just take care of yourself
Hey sorry, I was reluctant to text but I couldn't. Just wanted to know if you are feeling better now
Hii
I am coping up
Thanks for asking
No problem at all. Take care of yourself and sorry if I did or say something that might have upset you. Wasn't my intention
You have been anything but good to me
And that is why I want to take some time as all of this going on
The videos and photos have just stuck to me
I don’t want to be a negative bearer
You are not but I was worried and overthinking. Just wanted to check that's all
I can understand..it's difficult, we can't do much other than making duas. May Allah help them
Take your time and take care of yourself
Yes’s
Thank you
Please take care of yourself too
Yess
Heyy you🌻
How are you now?
Hii
I meant to ask if u feeling better now
I have never felt more stupid. It hurts but that's fine. Will not disturb you again.
I am really sorry
You have the right to do that and I won’t stop you
Just I am sorry for this
It's not like I am doing this out of my willingness. You don't want me to do that. But u are not saying it
You don't have to be. I should be the one who should be sorry
I seriously don't know what happened. What did I do  that's making you feel guilty messaging me as you said.
I must have done or said something
Again 🙃
I am struggling with myself
My mind is not stable
I want you not get affected with it
And that’s why I stopped
You can and you should talk it out. It helps
That's no good reason. That's not gonna affect me. This does
I keep thinking that talking to you is sinning
And I don’t want to associate you with guilt
It’s my fault tht I started this

What..why will u even think like that. It's like the most basic thing and I don't think it is prohibited. You are just taking, sharing things, getting to know someone. It's not like I am passing time with you..was never my intention nor will ever be.
Don't say that.
Its that my mind won’t stop torturing me
I have utterly nonsense thought process
And that is why I don’t want to be stuck with this and it selfish of me do so because I don’t want to be this vulnerable infront of you.

I understand, but this is not something that's out of line. I have heard from many scholars that before u get into something, you should get to know them. And talking is like the basic thing that one has to start from.And you are the purest soul I know. I have seen/met people and they don't even have the ability to differentiate between good and bad things. I don't want u to force. But that's something which u shouldn't think about
You have made me vulnerable as well. I don't really know what to say more. But believe me I was seriously not passing time and I meant what I said. I do care for you as a person
I agree and that is why I decided to reply that first text of yours but I have realised you are way too perfect. You have lived a beautiful life and we are different in terms of that
I am very flawed due to my experiences and i will not be able to offer more than receiving which is not fair.
You don't know that ma'am
Yes but you turned out good unlike me
I only need time
Everyone is flawed. No one is perfect. That's what makes us human. But that doesn't mean we should stop caring for someone
So that I can put myself truthfully upfront
And feel trapped by my own self
Can you give me that
Please
I am not the one making decisions here. So, yes.
Take care of yourself that's all I can say. I will be there
Take care of yourself for me
I will try
Hey, how are you lately
I guess tomorrow you will be starting your new job..so, just wanted to say all the best for that :)
I am better
Thank you
I missed you
That's good
I missed you way too much. I missed talking to you
Especially today
That's why I texted you, I told you I was a magician
I kept looking at the notification
I believe it now 😌
Did something happen?
I was feeling better today
And it made me remember you
I was feeling horrible from the last week like something was missing
I thought you will never speak to me
It did hurt but I told you I will be there
I am sorry for that
It's okay, you don't have to be sorry
Were u angry ?
I would have felt angry honestly
A little but i was more hurt because I kept thinking that what did I do and If I didn't do anything then why u don't want to talk. It was difficult to comprehend
I did not know how to explain as it was all jumbled inside me as well
The isolation gives me clarity
But I know it’s not good for the other person
Yes, it's not. But it's okay. I understand. Everyone has a different way of dealing with things
They do
Yess
What did you do all this time
Without someone always messaging u
Last week I was having dinner and my sister looked at me and was like why are u so traumatized. I literally blanked out.
I was trying to keep myself busy working. As long as I was working I was fine.
Same
I told u to take care of yourself
I am bad at taking care of myself
I got off work and am walking to home
Now?
Yepp
Did u go for Diwali celebration?
Yes
It was meh
Cool
Okkay.. at least less work on that day
Nah
They told us complete our work by 5pm and then had the thing for 1 hour
Just nothing
Felt like was attending fancy dress at school
It's like the corporate version of that
I swear
I didn't go to office this week was working from home. I am thinking of not going to office anymore
I like you work from home version too
But my manager won't like that
I don’t like your manager tho
I hate him too. He has involved me in too many works now a days
I didn't say him anything because this is like the appraisal month..so gotta be careful 😂
Hehe
You will get it I know it 😎
I hope so, otherwise I am gonna switch the job soon
These job be taking most the life
I will be back after having dinner sir
Yess, Ikr 🥲
Okay ma'am..take your time
I am back
Okkay
What did u have
Guess sir
I will go with either fish or chicken
You have to lock the answer sir
Time is ticking
Fish .is it?
Would like to lock the answer?
Yes ma'am lock Kar do AAP answer ko
Ji app Jeet gaye
I went with my heart this time
You should trust your heart
Yes, I should do that more often
What u gonna have ?
My parents are not home..so, not sure
Afternoon I went out with my brother to Jogeshwari, had keema and naan there
I wanna have shawarma
U told that u know a good joint for shawarma ..right
Yea
In Yaris road Versova
Yeahh, right
There is a place nearby, they got good shawarma too
Will get it for you some time
I never say no to food
You want  now
We should never say no to food
I had dinner so shoud not
You should make something
What should I make..feeling lazy tbh.
Thought of skipping dinner
Do u want me to nag Mr Aamir
Yess 😂
Then I might end up cooking
You should have something at night
Or you become deprived of necessary things for body
And turn alien
And forget how to speak and converse
Do you want to not being able to speak sir?
No ma'am, that got me scared 😳
Now I gotta think what should I make
Yepp
You can make something simple
Yess.
I could make you chicken salad
Will have oats. Will take like 5 mins
Will you
Yepp
I was gonna make it on my week off
Ohh
Are you gonna watch match tomorrow
Yes, it's finals so
Wbu?
Me too
We got the permission
To leave work at 5.30
So can watch second innings at least
Okkay, that's good. Atleast You will see the winning team
Right.
Who do you think is gonna win
They are hyping up India
So gotta see first
Yess, I am a bit skeptical cause Australia has a record of winning more icc finals
And India has the record to lose unecoectantly as well
*unexpectantly
Yess we never know.. especially in the finals
But I wanna see India win
Yess
I felt really sad in the last World Cup when India was playing against newzealand in semifinals and Dhoni got runout 🥲
I had my exam next day and I couldn't study after that
The frustration was on another level
My sis cried
It was really sad
Yupp..and especially knowing that it was Dhoni's last world cup
Right he went out crying and it felt stinging to heart
You remember 😮
I dooo
I am just not regular because I don’t have people to watch with
But I like sports
I used to follow every match until Dhoni was there. Now I don't follow the entire match. I watch in bits and pieces now
We can watch
🥹🥹🥹 sameee in my houseeee
We should
Okkay
Who is your favourite btw?
I like Kohli
And Ishaan
But I hated Mumbai Indians
Idk y
Samee
I used to support CSK
They won the last one and that was quite a thriller
We could not believe it
Yupp
